description: Zero-byte program — the null program is specially trapped and is not a quine.
expected_output: In Homespring, the null program is not a quine.

2003-cal-henderson.skip_reason: Has no special handling for the null program and silently produces nothing

2017-addison-bean.notes: Empty source is parsed as a single-node River rather than triggering the Quine branch, so the hardcoded 'not a quine' message never fires.

2018-martijn-arts.notes: No special handling for the null/empty program.

2023-james-thistlewood.notes: Parser crashes with 'trying to add token above root' — the tokenizer yields a trailing empty token for the empty source that buildTree can't resolve.
